title: An Christmas Pack
description: The perfect pack for your Christmas 🎁🍪🎅⛄
body:
![christmas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5180567c20835d2237a988d18975435db320336b_0.webp)

 

**Celebrate the magic of Christmas** in Minecraft with An Christmas Pack!
This festive texture pack transforms your world into a snowy and joyful holiday landscape while preserving the classic Minecraft feel. From glowing decorations and cozy lights to frosted trees and cheerful details, it’s the perfect way to bring the Christmas spirit to your game.

✨ Features
Christmas-themed textures that stay true to Minecraft’s original look.
Snow-covered grass, icy leaves, and festive blocks across the world.
Custom holiday GUI with red, green, and gold accents.
Reimagined mobs and environmental elements for a wintry atmosphere.
Perfect for survival or creative worlds during the holiday season.
